ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "slug" TEXT /* SEO-friendly URL slug for the article */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main image associated with the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the article */,
  "read_time" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time of the article */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date and time the article was last modified */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the article is featured */,
  "meta_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for SEO purposes */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "profile_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON object to store links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the author */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* The date the author joined the blog */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* The date the author was last active */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the author is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "image_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the image (width and height) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the image is publicly accessible */,
  "copyright_information" TEXT /* Information about the copyright of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the tag is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the tag was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the tag was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-tag mapping */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the comment is marked as spam */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reader, author, admin) */,
  "profile_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's profile image */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the article */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the article */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was shared */,
  "share_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the article was shared (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the article on the specified platform */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the share has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating the article */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "related_articles" (
  "related_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each related article mapping */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary article */,
  "related_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related article */,
  "related_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the relevance of the related article */,
  "is_manual" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the relation is manually set or automatically generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("related_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_articles_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_articles_related_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., edit, publish, unpublish) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* The previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* The new value of the changed field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* A brief description of why the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_history_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, publish) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mappings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
